evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signal (data quality) is present with no velocity/speed language anywhere, so rigour dominates despite being a brief mention.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: NETS is a payments/electronic funds transfer company (fintech), a default-high sector, even though this specific JD's language is generic BI reporting.
evidence.data_team_maturity: monitoring performance metrics, ensuring data quality across reports
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The role maintains and improves existing departmental dashboards and reporting processes rather than building from scratch, indicating a growing, established-but-not-fully-mature function.
evidence.jd_authorship: translate business requirements into clear KPIs and visualisations
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities are largely generic boilerplate ('perform trend analysis', 'engaging with stakeholders to clarify reporting needs') without precise scale, volume, or methodology specifics — could apply to almost any BI role.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: creating and maintaining departmental dashboards while consolidating data from multiple sources
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role centers on internal departmental reporting and dashboard consumers, placing it in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: engaging with stakeholders to clarify reporting needs
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Verbs are execution-oriented (create, maintain, translate, monitor, ensure) delivering scoped reporting work rather than setting data strategy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools for the candidate or AI-consuming data infrastructure anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is mentioned only briefly ('ensuring data quality across reports') without an explicit testing framework or ownership verb structure.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: data quality is mentioned as an operational concern but the JD lacks compliance, audit, or regulatory framing typical of high loss aversion in this sector's other roles.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: monitoring performance metrics, ensuring data quality across reports
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Dominant verbs are maintaining, monitoring, and consolidating existing dashboards rather than building new infrastructure.
